positive: A mystical, stylized forest creature, perhaps a fusion of feline and deer elements, standing alertly in a sun-dappled grove. The creature should possess sleek, minimalist outlines, giving it a strong, graphic silhouette against a subtly patterned background of ancient roots and glowing moss. Use a limited color palette of deep forest greens, midnight blues, and golden ochre accents. Focus on strong linework and high contrast, suitable for a screen-printed apparel graphic. Style: Pacific Northwest tattoo art meets Art Nouveau linocut. Composition: Centered, vertically oriented main subject with negative space around it. Lighting: Dramatic, ethereal subsurface scattering, emphasizing edges. Print-ready, clean vector aesthetic.
negative: blur, artifacts, noisy, text, signature, logo, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, extra limbs, fuzzy, graffiti, photorealism
